label: Render node properties (spastic)
description: Render node properties for spastic jitter and rotation movement effects.

rotateFacing.label: Rotate facing
rotateFacing.description: If true, the spastic node rotates to face a random direction during each spasm.

scaleRange.label: Scale range
scaleRange.description: Range of random scale multipliers applied during each spasm.

rotationRange.label: Rotation range
rotationRange.description: Range of random rotation angles in degrees applied during each spasm.

offsetRangeX.label: Offset range X
offsetRangeX.description: Range of random X-axis position offset applied during each spasm.

offsetRangeZ.label: Offset range Z
offsetRangeZ.description: Range of random Z-axis position offset applied during each spasm.

durationTicksRange.label: Duration ticks range
durationTicksRange.description: Range of random tick durations for each spasm event.

nextSpasmTicksRange.label: Next spasm ticks range
nextSpasmTicksRange.description: Range of random tick delays between spasm events.
